title: Remainder of the Story of Musaylimah the Liar and His Tribe of the People of al-Yamamah
description: His Tribe of the People of al -Yamamah According to al-Sari-Shu `ayb-Sayf-Sahl b. Yusuf-al-Qasim b. MuI ammad:687 When Abu Bakr sent `Ikrimah b. Abi Jahl against Musaylimah and sent Shurabbil after him, `Ikrimah made haste and strove to precede Shuralibil so that he might secure [for himself] the fame [of having made war.]688 He attacked (Musaylimah 's followers), whereupon they defeated him. Shurabbil remained on the road where689 the news reached him.

sources.citation: al-Tabari, The History of al-Tabari (SUNY), vol. 10
